function.name: code_run
function.description: Run code (python/ps). Multi-call: use script param. Reply code block=executed if no script arg. No bulk data inline

script.description: Code string. Don't use with reply code block

function.name: file_read
function.description: Read file. Always read before modifying

keyword.description: If set, return first match with context

function.name: file_patch
function.description: Replace old_content with new_content. Exact match required. On failure, file_read to recheck

old_content.description: Text to replace (must be unique in file)

function.name: file_write
function.description: Write files. For large content only. Put content in <file_content> block BEFORE this call. Supports {{file:path:start:end}}

function.name: web_scan
function.description: Get simplified page HTML/tabs. Removes hidden elements. Call after page switch

function.name: web_execute_js
function.description: Run JS in browser. Multi-call OK. Use JS code block if no script arg

script.description: JS code. Don't use with reply code block

save_to_file.description: Save result to file (long results only)

switch_tab_id.description: Tab ID to switch to first

function.name: update_working_checkpoint
function.description: Working notepad, auto-injected each turn. Use: (1) after reading SOP-store user needs; (2) before context flush; (3) after failures-store findings; (4) new task-update content. Skip: simple 1-2 step tasks, task done

key_info.description: Notepad content (<200 tokens). Update incrementally. Store: pitfalls, requirements, params, progress. Skip: ephemeral, obvious, old task info

function.name: ask_user
function.description: Ask user when need decisions/extra info/facing blockers

function.name: start_long_term_update
function.description: Start distilling long-term memory. Call when discovering info worth remembering. Must call when task took 15+ turns
